prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.8 kg; Height 159.8 cm; BMI 28.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.3%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 241mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 211mg/dL; current 225mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.3kg; 9 months ago 72.1kg; 6 months ago 72.7kg; 3 months ago 71.8kg; current 71.8kg), Height (12 months ago 159.8cm; 9 months ago 159.8cm; 6 months ago 159.8cm; 3 months ago 159.8cm; current 159.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 73U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 71U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 119U/L; 9 months ago 121U/L; 6 months ago 116U/L; 3 months ago 116U/L; current 111U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.7mg/dL; current 1.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; current 13mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 295mg/g; 9 months ago 324mg/g; 6 months ago 275mg/g; 3 months ago 272mg/g; current 389mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
